hero.headline: Where Every Child Makes a Splash
hero.subheadline: Nurturing curious minds, building confident leaders — from Pre-K through Grade 8.

highlights.title: 15:1 Student-Teacher Ratio
highlights.description: Small class sizes ensure every child gets personal attention and thrives at their own pace.

highlights.title: CBSE + International Curriculum
highlights.description: A blended curriculum that combines the rigour of CBSE with global best practices.

highlights.title: 10-Acre Green Campus
highlights.description: Sprawling grounds with sports fields, gardens, and purpose-built learning spaces.

highlights.title: 25+ Co-Curricular Activities
highlights.description: From robotics to classical dance — discover what lights up your child.

whyDolphin.title: Why Dolphin Kids?
points: Award-winning faculty with an average of 12 years of teaching experience
Integrated STEAM programme starting from Grade 1
Safe, inclusive campus with 24/7 CCTV and trained security
Parent engagement through the Dolphin Connect app

testimonials.quote: My daughter has blossomed since joining Dolphin Kids. The teachers genuinely care about each child's growth.
testimonials.author: Priya M., Parent of Grade 3 student

testimonials.quote: The balance between academics and activities is perfect. Our son looks forward to school every day.
testimonials.author: Rahul & Sneha K., Parents of Grade 5 student
